global_description: A medium-sized bird with a robust, compact body and a short neck. It features predominantly gray plumage with black wings and tail, and a distinctive white patch on the tail. The beak is long, straight, and pointed, adapted for seed extraction.

part_details.plumage: Smooth, predominantly gray with contrasting black on wings and tail.
part_details.wings: Black, medium-length, providing strong flight capabilities.
part_details.tail: Black with a distinctive white patch, short and squared.
part_details.beak: Long, straight, and pointed, black in color.
part_details.head: Gray with a short neck, rounded shape.

spatial_relations: The black wings are attached to the sides of the gray body.
The white patch is located at the end of the black tail.
The long beak protrudes from the front of the head.
